seoTitle: New Mapoon vs Newell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Mapoon and Newell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Mapoon vs Newell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Mapoon and Newell.
heading: New Mapoon vs Newell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Mapoon, Queensland and Newell, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score (21/100) compared to Newell (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Mapoon or Newell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Mapoon has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Newell scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Mapoon scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Newell scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Mapoon or Newell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
